title: serratula angustifolia
intro: Serratula angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Milk Thistle, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Serratula angustifolia include its ability to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or used in infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
